title: Compass Group India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Compass Group India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Compass Group India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Gurgaon. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Compass Group India:
Compass Group India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Compass Group India!
